competitions.title: They Put a $100 Bounty on My Right Arm!
competitions.summary:
When Sean Hancock announced there would be a $100 bounty on my right arm at AUA ArmWrestling Nationals, I had two choices...
Take it easy...Or make it even harder.

Instead of pulling one or two classes like most competitors, I entered every class I was eligible for. 
Fourteen classes. No idea who was signing up, but if I'm going to do it... might as well go all the way. 
Left arm.
Right arm.
One long day.

The bounty only applied to my right arm, but every match mattered. Some went exactly how I planned... others didn't.
That's competition.

Huge thanks to Sean Hancock, AUA, everyone who came out, and every athlete who stepped up to the table. It was an incredible event.

Let me know...
If you were putting a bounty on one arm, would you choose right or left?

#ArmWrestling #MonsterMichaelTodd #AUANationals

Join this channel to get access to perks:https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCarJKBV9GEpXRHrw4bEEhHA/join
👕https://www.ninelineapparel.com/discount/MONSTER20 for a discount. Support the company that gives back to those who give all.
💪Visit https://monstermichaeltodd.com for all your training tools, apparel, social media links, and partner links
